seoTitle: Fairy Dell vs Faraday — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fairy Dell and Faraday. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fairy Dell vs Faraday: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fairy Dell and Faraday.
heading: Fairy Dell vs Faraday — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fairy Dell, Victoria and Faraday, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fairy Dell has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Faraday (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fairy Dell or Faraday safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fairy Dell has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Faraday scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fairy Dell scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Faraday scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fairy Dell or Faraday?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fairy Dell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
